# FDA Approvals MCP

> FDA drug approvals, 510(k) device clearances, recalls, adverse-event reports, drug shortages

This MCP server exposes 6 tools via the Model Context Protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST). It runs on Cloudflare Workers and is billed via Dodo Payments. Authenticated via `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` obtained by subscribing at `https://fda-approvals-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade`.

## Endpoint
- MCP JSON-RPC: https://fda-approvals-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp
- Health: https://fda-approvals-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/health
- Landing page: https://fda-approvals-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/
- Get API key: https://fda-approvals-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade?tier=solo

## Tools
- `fda_drug_approval_search`: Search FDA drug approvals from Drugs@FDA filtered by sponsor, brand name, generic, or approval date.
- `fda_drug_label`: FDA-approved drug label for a brand/generic — indications, dosage, contraindications, warnings.
- `fda_recall_search`: Search drug/device/food recall events by Class I/II/III and date.
- `fda_adverse_events`: Aggregate FAERS adverse-event reports — total, unique reactions, top reactions (deduped by safetyreportid).
- `fda_510k_search`: Search FDA 510(k) medical-device clearances.
- `fda_drug_shortages`: Current FDA-tracked drug-shortage list.

## Authentication
Pass `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` on POST /mcp. Free tier: anonymous, 100 calls / month / IP.

## Pricing
- Free: 100 calls / month (anonymous, no signup)
- Solo $9/mo: 2,000 calls / month, 60/min
- Team $29/mo: 10,000 calls / month, 200/min, 5 team seats
- Pro $79/mo: 50,000 calls / month, 600/min, 25 team seats
Billed via Dodo Payments (merchant-of-record). Cancel anytime.

## Account management
- View account: GET https://fda-approvals-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account (Bearer)
- Rotate key: POST https://fda-approvals-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/rotate (Bearer)
- GDPR data export: GET https://fda-approvals-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/export (Bearer)
- Team management (Team+): https://fda-approvals-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/team
